English: I mean, even if I get out of here tomorrow, it's still gonna look bad.

Japanese: （‥‥みんな、 ムリを言うよな‥‥）
English: (Everyone loves a good scandal...)

Japanese: 亡くなった藤見野　イサオさん とは、どんな‥‥？
English: About you and the victim, Mr. Juan Corrida, what sort of...

Japanese: ベツに、関係ありませんよ。
English: That's got nothing to do with anything, dude.

Japanese: あのカオでボクと同い年なんて、 笑っちゃうよね。
English: Man, with that face of his, you can't even tell he's the same age as me.

Japanese: ムリヤリ《忍者ナンジャ》を 映画化したみたいだけど‥‥
English: And he wanted to try making a "Jammin' Ninja" movie, even though we all know it'd fail.

Japanese: 結果はトノサマンの勝ち、 といったところですね。
English: The Nickel Samurai still won in the end, right?

Japanese: ‥‥そう。 グランプリはいただいたから。
English: Yeah. I took the Grand Prix by storm.

Japanese: だから、ボクがアイツを 殺す理由なんて、ないんですよ。
English: So why would I, the winner, have any reason to kill the guy anyway?

Japanese: 向こうがこっちをねらうなら ともかく、ね。
English: Dude, you'd think it'd be the other way around, you know?

Japanese: あの‥‥。どうして タイホされたんですか？
English: Um... Do you know why you were arrested?

Japanese: どうも、身体検査が よくなかったみたいですね。
English: I guess maybe my full body search went badly.

Japanese: 何か、見つかったんですか？
English: Did they find something on you?

Japanese: ‥‥忍者ナンジャの衣装に ついていた、ボタン。
English: They found a button from the Jammin' Ninja's costume.

Japanese: ボタン‥‥？
English: A button...?

Japanese: ‥‥なぜか知らないけど、ぼくの 衣装のハカマに挟まってたんです。
English: I don't get it either. It was caught in the pleats of my samurai pants, or "hakama".

Japanese: きゃあっ！
English: Aaah!

Japanese: 冗談じゃないですよ。 だれかが挟んだに決まってます。
English: Dude, I really think someone planted it there though. I'm serious.

Japanese: （ホントにそうなのか‥‥？）
English: (I wonder if that's what really happened...?)

Japanese: オートロさん。コレ、 弁護士のバッジなんですよ。
English: Mr. Engarde, this is an attorney's badge.

Japanese: すみません。ボク、そんなコト してるヒマ、ありませんから。
English: Dude, I'm sorry, but I don't have the free time to be looking at things like that.

Japanese: ‥‥はい？
English: ...Huh?

Japanese: ボク、今、トノサマンで せいいっぱいだから。
English: I'm much too busy with Nickel Samurai stuff right now.

Japanese: ベンゴシの通信教育なんて‥‥
English: I don't have the time to take a lawyer's correspondence course...

Japanese: （ぼくはどうも、押し売りヅラ らしいな‥‥）
English: (Why does he believe I'm a salesman!? Insurance, then extinguishers... Now this!!)

Japanese: ‥‥なるほどくん。 どうするんですか？　それ。
English: ...Mr. Nick? What are you going to do with that?

Japanese: わからないけど、 とりあえず見せてみるよ。
English: I don't know yet, but I figured I could at least show it to him...

Japanese: トランシーバーですか。 あ。けっこうイイですね。
English: Is that a transceiver? Hey, it looks like a real nice one too.

Japanese: ある人物からプレゼント されたんです。
English: I got it as a "present" from someone.

Japanese: へえ。そうなんですか。
English: Hmm? Interesting.

Japanese: それで‥‥あなたの弁護を 引き受けるように、って。
English: I've also been instructed to take your case.

Japanese: そのトランシーバーが？ そう言ったんですか？
English: Is that what you heard from the transceiver?

Japanese: はい。
English: Yes.

Japanese: いけませんね。ヒトの言うことを ハイハイ聞いてるだけじゃ。
English: Dude, that's terrible! Don't let some disembodied voice boss you around!

Japanese: （それはアンタのほうだよ！）
English: (This coming from a man with a cell phone on his wrist...)

Japanese: ‥‥？　なんですか、それ。
English: What's that?

Japanese: 記者会見の整理券ですよ。
English: It's a ticket for the press conference.

Japanese: グランプリを受賞したあと、 開かれるはずだったんですよね？
English: You were going to give one after winning the Grand Prix, right?

Japanese: え。ボクがですか？
English: Huh? Me?

Japanese: そう。トノサマンの 着ぐるみのまま。
English: Yes. While you were in-costume no less.

Japanese: ボク、聞いてませんケド。
English: Um, I never heard anything like that, dude. I only heard about the stage show.

Japanese: そういうコトは、 マネージャーさんにまかせてるし。
English: I always leave that kind of stuff to my manager.

Japanese: （知らない‥‥？　ヘンだな‥‥）
English: (He didn't know...? That's odd...)

Japanese: たしかにボク、おカネは イヤになるほどありますけど、
English: Dude, I know I like to throw money around,

Japanese: なんでも買う、ってワケじゃ ないんですよ。
English: but it's not like I buy anything and everything.

Japanese: （売るつもりもないけど）
English: (That's nice, because it's not up for sale anyway!)

Japanese: ‥‥見たことあるカオですね。 ファンクラブのヒトかな。
English: I've seen him somewhere before... Is he a member of my fan club?

Japanese: 荷星さんです。センパイでしょう？ ‥‥あなたの。
English: That's Mr. Powers. Isn't he supposed to be kind of like a mentor to you?

Japanese: ニボシ‥‥？　ああ、 体操のおニイさん、やってる。
English: Powers...? Oh yeah! He's the guy on that kid's exercise program.

Japanese: このあいだ、 サイン書いてあげましたよ。
English: I gave him an autograph just the other day.

Japanese: （まったく、センパイの立場が ないな‥‥）
English: (He doesn't see Mr. Powers as a mentor at all...)

Japanese: ‥‥亡くなったそうですね。 おキノドクに。
English: Man, it's too bad he's dead...

Japanese: あなたが殺害した‥‥ そう考えられてるんですよ？
English: You killed him... That's the most logical conclusion, don't you agree?

Japanese: そんなワケ、ないですよ。 何かのまちがいです。
English: Dude, what are you talking about!? You're making a huge mistake.

Japanese: 何かのまちがいで 逮捕状は出ませんよ！
English: If that's such a mistake, then why did they issue an arrest warrant for you!?

Japanese: ちょっと待って。ここの所長さん に聞いてみるから。
English: Hold on a sec. I'm gonna ask the guy in charge of this place, OK?

Japanese: カオが広いですねえ。 やっぱり、すたあさんは。
English: Stars sure know a lot of people, don't they?

Japanese: （ホントにかけてるのか？ あの電話‥‥）
English: (I wonder if that phone even really gets reception in here...)

Japanese: ‥‥たしかに、まちがいじゃ ないそうです。
English: ...Um, I guess you're right about the warrant after all.

Japanese: （これで１歩、前進 ‥‥したのかな？）
English: (Ladies and gentlemen, I believe we might be making some progress here!)

Japanese: ハンサムですよね。ホント。ボク。
English: Yeah... I'm such a handsome devil.

Japanese: え、ええ。まあ。
English: Uh... Um, yeah...

Japanese: 空手、柔道、抜刀道、ヤリに シュリケン、小刀護身道に居合道。
English: And I'm way good at sports! Karate, tennis, judo, soccer, football, hockey, fencing...

Japanese: そりゃあ、人気も出ますよね。
English: Dude, it's no wonder I'm so popular.

Japanese: え、ええ。まあ。 （悪気がないぶん、ハラ立つな）
English: Uh... Um, yeah... (You're also good at sitting in a jail cell, Mr. Popular.)

Japanese: そのヒト、ファンクラブの 会員かな。
English: Um, dude, this person looks like a member of my fan club.

Japanese: ちょっと待って。ファンクラブの 会長さんに聞いてみるから。
English: Hold on a sec. I'm gonna ask the fan club president, OK?

Japanese: いえもう、けっこうです‥‥。
English: Um, "dude", you know what...? Forget I asked...
